name: Statistics
desc: Updates statistic values (walk distance, damage dealt, items crafted, etc.).

implementation.overview: S37 updates the client's statistic values. Sent after C16PacketClientStatus(REQUEST_STATS). No module in the examined client sources directly targets S37.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S37PacketStatistics)
modules.purpose: Server sends S37PacketStatistics to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
